</span></div></div></nav></div><div class="site grid-container container hfeed" id="page"><div class="site-content" id="content"><div class="content-area" id="primary"><main class="site-main" id="main"><article id="post-2" class="post-2 page type-page status-publish" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork" itemscope><div class="inside-article"><div class="entry-content" itemprop="text"><section class="gb-container gb-container-190ba00e"><div class="gb-container gb-container-f6578a71"><div class="gb-container gb-container-69101d0b"><h1 class="gb-headline gb-headline-d9dff7c5 gb-headline-text"><mark class="gb-highlight">PM Surya Ghar Yojana 2024:</mark> How to Apply Online @ pmsuryaghar.gov.in Subsidy, Benefits &amp; So on</h1><p class="has-white-color has-text-color">PM Surya Ghar Scheme firstly named by Hon&#8217;ble Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi on 13th February. Basically full name of this scheme is PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana. Which provides 300 Units Free Electricity every month to the eligible families in India. Let&#8217;s Discuss Full details of this Free Electricity Scheme in this webpage.</p></div><div class="gb-container gb-container-54106995"></div></div><div class="gb-shapes"><div class="gb-shape gb-shape-1"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1200 130.3" preserveAspectRatio="none"><path d="M0 107.9l40-22.2c40-21.9 120-66.9 200-62.2 80 4.4 160 57.8 240 53.3C560 72 640 10.4 720 1.2S880 37 960 59c80 22.3 160 22.3 200 22.3h40v49H0v-22.4z"/></svg></div></div></section><section class="gb-container gb-container-fdbd6300"><div class="gb-container gb-container-f21ce1dd"><div class="gb-container gb-container-b910f0a6"><figure class="wp-block-kadence-image kb-image2_fb481a-a7 size-full"><img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODdhAQABAPAAAMPDwwAAACwAAAAAAQABAAACAkQBADs=" fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="651" height="383" data-src="https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-surya-ghar-yojana-launched.webp" alt="PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana" class="kb-img wp-image-1039" data-srcset="https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-surya-ghar-yojana-launched.webp 651w, https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-surya-ghar-yojana-launched-300x176.webp 300w" data-sizes="(max-width: 651px) 100vw, 651px" /><noscript><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="651" height="383" src="https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-surya-ghar-yojana-launched.webp" alt="PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana" class="kb-img wp-image-1039" srcset="https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-surya-ghar-yojana-launched.webp 651w, https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-surya-ghar-yojana-launched-300x176.webp 300w" sizes="(max-width: 651px) 100vw, 651px" /></noscript></figure></div><div class="gb-container gb-container-32e1430d"><h2 class="gb-headline gb-headline-fcccb11c gb-headline-text">Introducing of PM Surya Ghar Yojana</h2><p>First of all PM Modi announced this scheme as PM Suryoday Yojana on 22nd January. But later on PM Announced the scheme name as PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana (पीएम सूर्य घर मुफ़्त बिजली योजना) through their Official &#8220;X&#8221; Account on 13th February.</p><ul><li>Main Aim to launching this scheme is to increase the utilization of Saur Energy.</li></ul><ul><li>By fulfilling the goal, it will automatically provides wellbeing for the poor people of the country.</li></ul></div></div></section><section class="gb-container gb-container-8a45a45f"><div class="gb-container gb-container-ad4503f9"><div class="gb-container gb-container-c0c76b75"><h3 class="gb-headline gb-headline-aff0c1a7 gb-headline-text">What is PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana?</h3><p>At the launching event, PM Modi said that this PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana (PMSGMBY) will provides sustainable solar energy to 1 Crore households of the state. At the same time they clarifies that this scheme for only poor and MIGs households.</p><ul><li>Getting approval from Cabinet meeting on 29th February.</li></ul><ul><li>During meeting, central government allocate fund of Rs 75021 Crore to the scheme.</li></ul></div><div class="gb-container gb-container-a09b2f0a"><figure class="wp-block-image size-full is-resized"><img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODdhAQABAPAAAMPDwwAAACwAAAAAAQABAAACAkQBADs=" decoding="async" width="500" height="500" data-src="https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-modi.webp" alt="" class="wp-image-1040" style="aspect-ratio:1.0148148148148148;width:440px;height:auto" data-srcset="https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-modi.webp 500w, https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-modi-300x300.webp 300w, https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-modi-150x150.webp 150w" data-sizes="(max-width: 500px) 100vw, 500px" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="500" height="500" src="https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-modi.webp" alt="" class="wp-image-1040" style="aspect-ratio:1.0148148148148148;width:440px;height:auto" srcset="https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-modi.webp 500w, https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-modi-300x300.webp 300w, https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/pm-modi-150x150.webp 150w" sizes="(max-width: 500px) 100vw, 500px" /></noscript></figure></div></div><div class="gb-container gb-container-8c1fbb12"><div class="gb-container gb-container-22594b20"><h3 class="gb-headline gb-headline-0876d5a5 gb-headline-text">Intention to launch 300 Units Free Electricity Scheme</h3></div></div><div class="gb-container gb-container-59887502"><div class="gb-container gb-container-ac8337f3"><div class="gb-container gb-container-dca15328"><div class="gb-container gb-container-d61299f7"><p>Central Government has main goal through launching of PM Surya Ghar Yojana is to provide free electricity to the low and medium income group family of the country. That&#8217;s why they can&#8217;t dependent on traditional source of electricity. one of the other objective is to provide the encouragement of utilization of solar energy which is nearly to free and eco friendly too.</p></div></div></div></div><h3 class="gb-headline gb-headline-5ed7f975 gb-headline-text">Quick Information</h3><figure class="wp-block-table is-style-regular"><table><thead><tr><th>Key Aspects</th><th>Output</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Scheme Name</td><td>PM &#8211; Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana</td></tr><tr><td>Short Name</td><td>PMSGMBY</td></tr><tr><td>Launched On</td><td>13th February, 2024</td></tr><tr><td>Initiative By</td><td>Central Government of India</td></tr><tr><td>Budget</td><td>Rs. 75021 Crore</td></tr><tr><td>Beneficiaries</td><td>Low and Medium Income Group Households</td></tr><tr><td>No. of Beneficiaries</td><td>1 Crore Household</td></tr><tr><td>Main Benefits</td><td>300 Units Free Bijli per Month</td></tr><tr><td>Solar Subsidy</td><td>Maximum 70%</td></tr><tr><td>Mode of Application</td><td>Online or Offline</td></tr><tr><td>How to Apply Online</td><td>Through pmsuryaghar.gov.in</td></tr><tr><td>How to Apply Offline</td><td>Through Post Office</td></tr></tbody></table></figure><h3 class="gb-headline gb-headline-6a221475 gb-headline-text">Financial Help under the Scheme</h3><p>Central govt will provide two types of financial help to the beneficiaries of PM Surya Ghar Yojana. One is through subsidy and another one is through bank loan. Both helps will be discussed below.</p><h4 class="gb-headline gb-headline-47389685 gb-headline-text">Subsidy Amount under PM Surya Ghar Yojana</h4><p>You are eligible to install 1 KW to 10 KW Rooftop solar under the scheme. But subsidy amount will vary from installation capacity of RTS (Rooftop Solar) system by the beneficiaries. You can easily understand subsidy structure by reading further.</p></section><section class="gb-container gb-container-e3feaa98"><div class="gb-grid-wrapper gb-grid-wrapper-8aea13f1"><div class="gb-grid-column gb-grid-column-ba6b213d"><div class="gb-container gb-container-ba6b213d"><h5 class="gb-headline gb-headline-79a1c004"><span class="gb-icon"><svg aria-hidden="true" role="img" height="1em" width="1em" viewBox="0 0 320 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="currentColor" d="M296 160H180.6l42.6-129.8C227.2 15 215.7 0 200 0H56C44 0 33.8 8.9 32.2 20.8l-32 240C-1.7 275.2 9.5 288 24 288h118.7L96.6 482.5c-3.6 15.2 8 29.5 23.3 29.5 8.4 0 16.4-4.4 20.8-12l176-304c9.3-15.9-2.2-36-20.7-36z"></path></svg></span><span class="gb-headline-text">Subsidy of 1 KW Solar Panel</span></h5><p style="font-size:15px">If you install 1 KW capacity of solar then you will get Rs 30,000 subsidy amount under the scheme.</p></div></div><div class="gb-grid-column gb-grid-column-cd6dc470"><div class="gb-container gb-container-cd6dc470"><h5 class="gb-headline gb-headline-b8105485"><span class="gb-icon"><svg aria-hidden="true" role="img" height="1em" width="1em" viewBox="0 0 320 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="currentColor" d="M296 160H180.6l42.6-129.8C227.2 15 215.7 0 200 0H56C44 0 33.8 8.9 32.2 20.8l-32 240C-1.7 275.2 9.5 288 24 288h118.7L96.6 482.5c-3.6 15.2 8 29.5 23.3 29.5 8.4 0 16.4-4.4 20.8-12l176-304c9.3-15.9-2.2-36-20.7-36z"></path></svg></span><span class="gb-headline-text">Subsidy up to 2 KW Solar Panel</span></h5><p style="font-size:15px">If you want to install 2 Kilowatt Solar panel then you will get Rs 60,000 subsidy amount under the yojana.</p></div></div><div class="gb-grid-column gb-grid-column-d6489351"><div class="gb-container gb-container-d6489351"><h5 class="gb-headline gb-headline-df17718e"><span class="gb-icon"><svg aria-hidden="true" role="img" height="1em" width="1em" viewBox="0 0 320 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="currentColor" d="M296 160H180.6l42.6-129.8C227.2 15 215.7 0 200 0H56C44 0 33.8 8.9 32.2 20.8l-32 240C-1.7 275.2 9.5 288 24 288h118.7L96.6 482.5c-3.6 15.2 8 29.5 23.3 29.5 8.4 0 16.4-4.4 20.8-12l176-304c9.3-15.9-2.2-36-20.7-36z"></path></svg></span><span class="gb-headline-text">Subsidy up to 3 KW Solar Panel</span></h5><p style="font-size:15px">If you install 3 KW capacity solar panel through PM Surya Ghar then you will get 78,000 rupees as a subsidy amount.</p></div></div><div class="gb-grid-column gb-grid-column-17699f59"><div class="gb-container gb-container-17699f59"><h5 class="gb-headline gb-headline-e58f552d"><span class="gb-icon"><svg aria-hidden="true" role="img" height="1em" width="1em" viewBox="0 0 320 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="currentColor" d="M296 160H180.6l42.6-129.8C227.2 15 215.7 0 200 0H56C44 0 33.8 8.9 32.2 20.8l-32 240C-1.7 275.2 9.5 288 24 288h118.7L96.6 482.5c-3.6 15.2 8 29.5 23.3 29.5 8.4 0 16.4-4.4 20.8-12l176-304c9.3-15.9-2.2-36-20.7-36z"></path></svg></span><span class="gb-headline-text">Subsidy for 3 to 10 KW Solar Panel</span></h5><p style="font-size:15px">If you are installing 3 to 10 KW capacity solar panel under the scheme then maximum you will get Rs 78,000 not more than that.</p></div></div></div></section><div class="gb-container gb-container-06f3293d"><div class="gb-container gb-container-df33ea86"><h4 class="gb-headline gb-headline-e074ce57 gb-headline-text">Solar Panel Loan Facility &#8211; PM &#8211; Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana</h4></div></div><div class="gb-container gb-container-9a8057d4"><div class="gb-container gb-container-6b08f2f3"><div class="gb-container gb-container-ae498832"><p>When Central govt nod to the scheme on 29th February, then after union minister Anurag Thakur said that applicant also will be facilitate finance options from the various banks and other companies. He further said that they will provide solar loan under PM Surya Ghar Yojana at minimum interest rate. From the below section you will check the list of banks and other finance companies that will provide a loan facility under the scheme.</p></div></div></div><div class="gb-container gb-container-ff1237d0"><div class="wp-block-image"><figure class="aligncenter size-full"><img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODdhAQABAPAAAMPDwwAAACwAAAAAAQABAAACAkQBADs=" decoding="async" width="500" height="100" data-src="https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/low-interest-solar-loan-1.webp" alt="PM Surya Ghar Yojana Loan from Banks" class="wp-image-1044" data-srcset="https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/low-interest-solar-loan-1.webp 500w, https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/low-interest-solar-loan-1-300x60.webp 300w" data-sizes="(max-width: 500px) 100vw, 500px" /><noscript><img decoding="async" width="500" height="100" src="https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/low-interest-solar-loan-1.webp" alt="PM Surya Ghar Yojana Loan from Banks" class="wp-image-1044" srcset="https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/low-interest-solar-loan-1.webp 500w, https://pmsuryaghar.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/low-interest-solar-loan-1-300x60.webp 300w" sizes="(max-width: 500px) 100vw, 500px" /></noscript></figure></div></div><div class="gb-container </span></li></ul></div><div class="gb-container gb-container-8458901a"><div class="gb-container gb-container-82b263ab"><h3 class="gb-headline gb-headline-17c6cb9c gb-headline-text">Eligibility Condition for PM Muft Bijli Yojana</h3></div></div><ul><li>Indian citizens are only eligible to avail benefits solar loan and solar subsidy under this scheme.</li><li>Only poor and middle income groups family are eligible.</li><li>Applicant must have own house and have a right of their rooftop.</li><li>Those who are government employee are not eligible for the scheme.</li><li>Applicant must have saving bank account on his/her name to receive subsidy amount.</li><li>Those who pay income tax to the government are also not eligible to receive subsidy benefits.</li><li>Must have sufficient space on the roof of the applicant&#8217;s house that&#8217;s why easily install the solar panel.</li></ul><div class="gb-container gb-container-19172d41"><h3 class="gb-headline gb-headline-932c7ad9 gb-headline-text">Documents Required for Online Registration</h3></div><ul><li>Aadhaar Number of the applicant</li><li>Recent Electricity Bill</li><li>Mobile Number</li><li>Other information like&#8230;<ul><li>DISCOM name</li><li>District name</li><li>State name</li><li>How much capacity of solar you want to install</li><li>Google map location of your house etc.</li></ul></li></ul><div
